fieldValues.value: RFC-004 Change D: Add schema-member type

Add `com.semanticops.spec/schema-member` to represent one addressable member of a schema definition, including member name, type expression, requiredness, nullability, constraints, schema default value, examples, deprecation, semantic purpose, and notes.
Members need identity so invariants, examples, and migrations can cite individual schema properties.

sourceRefs.note: Structured RFC-004 process record derived from the RFC-004 proposal content.
